description: Create comprehensive 4-panel analysis figure showing GO hierarchy, sequence similarity, domain architecture, and reaction comparison
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(16, 10))

# Create 2x2 grid
gs = fig.add_gridspec(2, 2, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.3)

# ========== Panel A: GO Term Hierarchy ==========
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)

ax1.text(5, 9.8, 'A. GO Term Hierarchy', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', ha='center')

# Draw hierarchy
nodes = [
    (5, 9.0, "GO:0016740\ntransferase activity", "lightgray", 10),
    (2.5, 7.5, "GO:0016765\ntransferring alkyl/aryl\n(NOT methyl)", "#FFB3B3", 9),
    (7.5, 7.5, "GO:0016741\ntransferring\none-carbon groups", "#B3FFB3", 9),
    (2.5, 5.8, "GO:0004766\nspermidine synthase\nactivity", "#FF6666", 9),
    (7.5, 6.2, "GO:0008168\nmethyltransferase\nactivity", "#90EE90", 8),
    (7.5, 4.5, "GO:0030750\nputrescine N-methyl-\ntransferase activity", "#00CC00", 9),
]

# Draw edges
edges = [
    (5, 8.6, 2.5, 8.0), (5, 8.6, 7.5, 8.0),  # transferase → children
    (2.5, 7.0, 2.5, 6.3),  # alkyl → SPDS
    (7.5, 7.0, 7.5, 6.7),  # one-carbon → methyltransferase
    (7.5, 5.7, 7.5, 5.0),  # methyltransferase → PMT
]
for x1, y1, x2, y2 in edges:
    ax1.annotate('', xy=(x2, y2), xytext=(x1, y1),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='black', lw=1.5))

for x, y, text, color, fs in nodes:
    ax1.text(x, y, text, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=fs-2,
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', lw=1.5))

# Cross-out arrow showing the error
ax1.annotate('WRONG\nBRANCH', xy=(3.5, 5.5), xytext=(5.0, 4.2),
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='red', ha='center',
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2.5, linestyle='--'))

ax1.text(5.0, 3.5, '✗ TreeGrafter assigned\nSPDS term to a PMT', fontsize=9,
        ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFEEEE', edgecolor='red'))

# ========== Panel B: Sequence Identity Bars ==========
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1])

categories = ['NaPMT1\n(PMT)', 'NtPMT1\n(PMT)', 'DsPMT\n(PMT)', 'AtSPDS1\n(SPDS)', 'HsSPDS\n(SPDS)']
identities = [100.0, 95.2, 67.6, 30.0, 12.5]  # k-mer similarities scaled
pabs_identities = [100.0, None, None, 72.3, 50.4]  # from NW alignment
colors = ['#2E8B57', '#3CB371', '#66CDAA', '#CD5C5C', '#8B0000']

bars = ax2.barh(range(len(categories)), identities, color=colors, edgecolor='black', height=0.6)

# Add PABS identity overlay where available
for i, pid in enumerate(pabs_identities):
    if pid is not None:
        ax2.barh(i, pid, color='none', edgecolor='white', linewidth=2, height=0.4, linestyle='--')
        ax2.text(pid + 1, i, f'{pid:.0f}% PABS', fontsize=8, va='center', color='white', fontweight='bold')

ax2.set_yticks(range(len(categories)))
ax2.set_yticklabels(categories, fontsize=9)
ax2.set_xlabel('Similarity to NaPMT3 (%)', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('B. Sequence Similarity to NaPMT3', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axvline(x=50, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5)
ax2.set_xlim(0, 110)

for i, v in enumerate(identities):
    ax2.text(v + 1, i, f'{v:.1f}%', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# ========== Panel C: Domain Architecture Comparison ==========
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax3.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax3.set_title('C. Domain Architecture Comparison', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

def draw_protein(ax, y, name, length, domains, color):
    # Draw backbone
    ax.plot([1, 9], [y, y], color='gray', lw=3, solid_capstyle='round')
    ax.text(0.5, y, f'{name}\n({length} aa)', fontsize=8, ha='right', va='center', fontweight='bold')
    
    for start_frac, end_frac, label, dcolor, is_diagnostic in domains:
        x1 = 1 + start_frac * 8
        x2 = 1 + end_frac * 8
        rect = plt.Rectangle((x1, y-0.3), x2-x1, 0.6, facecolor=dcolor, 
                             edgecolor='black', lw=2 if is_diagnostic else 1,
                             linestyle='-' if is_diagnostic else '-')
        ax.add_patch(rect)
        ax.text((x1+x2)/2, y, label, fontsize=7, ha='center', va='center', fontweight='bold')

# NaPMT3
draw_protein(ax3, 8, 'NaPMT3', 388, [
    (0.0, 0.23, 'Disordered\nN-term', '#DDDDDD', False),
    (0.25, 0.87, 'PABS domain', '#90EE90', False),
    (0.25, 0.87, '', '#90EE90', False),
], 'green')
ax3.text(6.5, 8.5, 'IPR025803 ✓', fontsize=8, color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(6.5, 8.15, 'PS51615 ✓', fontsize=8, color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(6.5, 7.5, 'IPR030668 ✗', fontsize=8, color='red')

# AtSPDS1
draw_protein(ax3, 6, 'AtSPDS1', 334, [
    (0.0, 0.12, 'N', '#DDDDDD', False),
    (0.13, 0.85, 'PABS domain', '#FFB3B3', False),
], 'red')
ax3.text(6.5, 6.5, 'IPR025803 ✗', fontsize=8, color='red')
ax3.text(6.5, 6.15, 'PS51615 ✗', fontsize=8, color='red')
ax3.text(6.5, 5.5, 'IPR030668 ✓', fontsize=8, color='darkred', fontweight='bold')

# Legend
ax3.text(2, 4.2, 'PMT-specific signatures:', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='darkgreen')
ax3.text(2, 3.6, '  IPR025803 (Putrescine N-MeTfrase)', fontsize=8, color='darkgreen')
ax3.text(2, 3.1, '  PS51615 (SAM_MT_PUTRESCINE)', fontsize=8, color='darkgreen')
ax3.text(2, 2.3, 'SPDS-specific signatures:', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='darkred')
ax3.text(2, 1.7, '  IPR030668 (Spermi_synthase_euk)', fontsize=8, color='darkred')

# ========== Panel D: Reaction Comparison ==========
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax4.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax4.set_title('D. Catalytic Reaction Comparison', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# PMT reaction
ax4.text(5, 9.2, 'NaPMT3 (PMT) — EC 2.1.1.53', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', 
        ha='center', color='darkgreen')
ax4.text(5, 8.4, 'Putrescine + SAM → N-methylputrescine + SAH', fontsize=9,
        ha='center', color='darkgreen',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#E0FFE0', edgecolor='darkgreen'))
ax4.text(5, 7.6, '→ Methyl group transfer', fontsize=9, ha='center', color='darkgreen',
        fontweight='bold')
ax4.text(5, 7.1, '→ First step of nicotine biosynthesis', fontsize=9, ha='center', 
        color='darkgreen')

# Divider
ax4.plot([1, 9], [6.3, 6.3], color='gray', lw=1, linestyle='--')
ax4.text(5, 6.5, 'vs.', fontsize=10, ha='center', color='gray', fontweight='bold')

# SPDS reaction (what TreeGrafter wrongly assigned)
ax4.text(5, 5.5, 'Spermidine Synthase — EC 2.5.1.16', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold',
        ha='center', color='darkred')
ax4.text(5, 4.7, 'Putrescine + dcSAM → Spermidine + MTA', fontsize=9,
        ha='center', color='darkred',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFE0E0', edgecolor='darkred'))
ax4.text(5, 3.9, '→ Aminopropyl group transfer', fontsize=9, ha='center', color='darkred',
        fontweight='bold')
ax4.text(5, 3.4, '→ Polyamine biosynthesis', fontsize=9, ha='center', color='darkred')

# Verdict
ax4.text(5, 2.2, 'VERDICT: Different cofactor, different product,\n'
        'different reaction mechanism, different pathway', fontsize=9,
        ha='center', fontweight='bold', color='navy',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#E0E0FF', edgecolor='navy', lw=2))

fig.suptitle('NaPMT3 TreeGrafter Annotation Error: Spermidine Synthase → Putrescine N-methyltransferase',
            fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=1.01)

plt.savefig('comprehensive_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Saved comprehensive_analysis.png")
